Boundry — interactive diagrams

The architecture diagrams below are the exact source Boundry compiles into dependency-linter rules.

Hexagonal + CQRS + DDD example → A layered domain/application/infrastructure model — the same diagram enforced by Boundry's e2e test suite. Boundry's own architecture → Boundry dogfoods its own layers: a pure boundary model, ports, pipeline, and pluggable adapters.
github.com/makspiechota/boundry
